rules.a: Artificial intelligence (AI) refers to the simulation of human intelligence in machines that are programmed to think and learn like humans. These intelligent systems can be trained to perform specific tasks, such as recognizing speech, visual patterns, or solving problems. AI technologies include machine learning, deep learning, natural language processing, computer vision, robotics, and others, enabling computers to mimic and augment human cognitive functions
AI refers to artificial intelligence technology that enables machines to perform tasks that typically require human-like intelligence.
